# Security & Confidentiality Policy

## 🚨 UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS ILLEGAL

If you have accessed this repository without written authorization, you are violating trade secret law. 

**Contact legal@omniops-ai.com immediately.**

## 🔐 For Authorized Users

Report security issues to: **security@omniops-ai.com**

**DO NOT:**
- ❌ Open public issues
- ❌ Discuss on social media  
- ❌ Post to forums
- ❌ Disclose to anyone

## Legal Notice

- This is a private repository containing trade secrets
- Unauthorized testing/access will be prosecuted
- All findings are confidential
- No bug bounty program exists

**Protected under Defend Trade Secrets Act (18 U.S.C. § 1836)**
